meta.title: FAQ | NexGen
meta.description: Frequently asked questions about NexGen AI agent installation service.
basic.0.q: How is this different from ChatGPT?
basic.0.a: ChatGPT is a shared cloud service. We provide an independent AI agent installed on your own machine, with permanent memory, full web search, browser automation, and more — capabilities that ChatGPT simply doesn’t have.
basic.1.q: I have zero technical knowledge. Can I use this?
basic.1.a: Absolutely. We handle all the technical setup. You just chat with the AI on Telegram — as easy as texting a friend.
basic.2.a: Within 24 hours. We set up a dedicated server and complete the installation for you — no technical steps on your end.
basic.3.q: Do I need to prepare my own server?
basic.3.a: No. The monthly fee includes a dedicated server, set up and managed entirely by us.
billing.0.q: Is there a contract? Can I cancel anytime?
billing.0.a: No contract. Choose from monthly, quarterly, or annual plans. Quarterly and annual plans come with discounts. Cancel anytime — no refunds. Service continues until the end of your current billing cycle.
billing.1.q: What does the monthly fee include?
billing.1.a: The monthly fee is all-inclusive: VPS server, AI compute costs, system maintenance, and monitoring. You won’t pay a single cent extra.
billing.2.q: What payment methods do you accept?
billing.2.a: We accept credit cards (Visa / Mastercard) and PayMe. Credit card payments trigger automatic installation; PayMe requires manual confirmation.
features.0.a: Built on Qdrant vector database + Mem0 memory engine, the AI remembers everything you’ve ever said. Unlike ChatGPT’s 100-memory limit, it recalls preferences you mentioned three months ago.
features.1.q: How is your web search different from ChatGPT’s?
features.1.a: ChatGPT’s search is blocked by many websites (like Reddit). We use SearXNG, a self-hosted search engine that can find what ChatGPT cannot.
features.2.a: The AI can directly operate a browser to fill forms, compare prices, make reservations, grab tickets, and check reviews. This is an Elite plan exclusive feature.
features.3.a: All your conversation history and memory are stored on your own server — we never log or store them. AI model calls use an encrypted API channel for secure communication.
support.0.a: Pro and Elite plans include auto-recovery (Watchdog), which monitors and repairs the system 24/7. For human support, submit a ticket via email (support@3nexgen.com).
support.1.q: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
support.1.a: Yes. Submit a support ticket via email anytime. The price difference is prorated.
support.2.a: You can cancel anytime. Service continues until the end of your current billing cycle, after which the server is reclaimed. No refunds.
bottomCta.title: Still have questions?
